title: Rose Nebula
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Rose Nebula''' was a massage parlor and spa on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was owned by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]], [[Rava Teb'lya]], who used her [[Spy/Legends|spying]] skills and experience in extravagance to glean information from her influential clients and then sold it to the highest bidder. The [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], [[Tsserk]], was hired by Teb'lya as a bouncer. [[Malia (person)|Malia]] worked there as a relaxation specialist and a spy.

{{Loc-stub}}
